goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt record preflight builder that validates runtime patch consume execution receipt authority is ready for later receipt recording while keeping permit consume, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, record receipts, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready runtime patch consume execution receipt authority can be preflighted for later receipt recording without executing it.
Receipt record ref, recorder ref, and record policy ref are required.
Receipt recording and runtime execution remain false.
assumptions: Actual receipt recording, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing record ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, receipt recording, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-145 authorized runtime patch consume execution receipt without recording it.
